name: SAM Check Cashing Machine
description_short: SAM Check Cashing Machine offers check cashing and financial services at a Verona, PA location. Limited details available from current web presence.
description_long: SAM Check Cashing Machine operates a physical check cashing location in Verona, Pennsylvania, serving the local community's financial service needs. Based on the available information, the business is positioned as a check cashing provider, indicating they facilitate conversion of checks into cash for customers who may not have traditional banking access or prefer alternative financial services. The company maintains a Verona storefront at 280 Hulton Road and provides a direct phone line for customer inquiries at (440) 252-5019. Their online presence, while minimal in the collected data, includes a reference to a locations page (samcheckcashing.com/locations), suggesting they may operate multiple service points. Without comprehensive website content detailing their full service menu, fee structures, or operational policies, the specific scope of their offerings remains partially obscured. The company appears to serve a traditional check cashing market niche, which typically includes individuals without bank accounts, those seeking quick cash access, and customers who prefer not to use traditional banking institutions. SAM Check Cashing Machine's primary distinguishing factor would be their local geographic presence in the Verona area, providing in-person service to regional customers. An honest assessment recognizes that detailed information about this business—including competitive fee schedules, accepted check types, processing times, and additional services—cannot be fully determined from the currently available website data. Potential customers should contact the location directly for comprehensive service details and pricing information.
pros: Physical location in Verona, PA provides in-person service access
Direct phone support available at (440) 252-5019 for customer inquiries
Established local business with identifiable address at 280 Hulton Rd
Multiple location references suggest expanded service availability
cons: Minimal online information available limits transparency on fees and services
Limited digital presence reduces accessibility for online research and account management
No detailed service menu or pricing information visible on primary web sources
Reliance on phone contact for basic service inquiries inconvenient for comparison shopping
best_for: Verona, PA area residents needing immediate check cashing services
Customers preferring in-person financial transactions over digital banking
Individuals seeking alternative to traditional bank check deposits
diagnosis: SAM Check Cashing Machine is best suited for Verona-area customers who need convenient, in-person check cashing and basic financial services without traditional bank accounts. The primary caveat is the severely limited public information available; potential customers must contact the business directly to confirm current services, fee structures, and operating hours before visiting.
